response.overview: In her debut comedy special, Ashley Hesseltine takes you on the journey from single girl who didn't want to get married to "geriatric" bride-to-be. Filmed just three weeks before her wedding, this sharp and hilarious hour blends unconventional marriage ideals with relatable dating stories, bedroom mishaps, and even feel-good family moments. It's a love story as much as a comedy special.
response.title: Here Comes the Bride
